title: be going to (do)
desc: 계획된 의도 또는 근거 있는 예측
examples: I'm almost out of kimchi. We eat a lot of microwave rice. I hate doing the dishes. Time to take out the trash. I'm setting my alarm. Cheers. I'm about to cook some soybean paste stew for dinner.

I'll eat it later this week.

title: will / won't
examples: I feel like this is still a pretty healthy packaged meal. When I think of meals that are ready to eat in the US, I don't think there is healthy. After a long day, I need a cold beer. This one is non-alcoholic, though, which is great because I can still enjoy a drink, knowing I won't have a hangover tomorrow. As I get older, my hangovers are getting worse and worse.

title: may / might (possibility)
examples: They say it's the Miracle Cream for anti-aging. I don't know if it's true, but I might as well try it.

title: have to / must
examples: I don't have to pay close attention and can just have it playing in the background.
I like small warmer lights. It makes your house feel more cozy. Even in the summer, I like to cuddle up with a blanket at night. I have to blow on my tea because it's so hot.

I must take these classes if I want to become a permanent resident here in Korea. Right now we're learning about ways to describe people's personalities. I learned a really fun word. It's mudukduk. I think it's such a fun word to say and has a really hilarious meaning. The cameraman is a little bit mudukduk. It's time for bed so I'm setting my alarm. I always set three alarms. The first one is at six then I have one at six fifteen and six thirty. Just in case but I always try my best not to hit the snooze button. Let's plug this in and go to bed. I keep my phone in the living room overnight so that I'm not tempted to scroll in bed. It also forces me to get out of bed to come out here and shut off the alarm. I always wear a silk bonnet to bed to protect my hair while I sleep and the last thing I do every single night before going to sleep is read my book. I love to read.

title: would (habit/conditional)
examples: If I'm doing that and then if a girl helping me out, will you get it? Definitely not. Why would I?
What? I mean, I would probably help first, but would you get mad if a boy helped me?

I don't want to burn my tongue. I feel like this is healing me from the inside out. I don't have a coffee table, so I need to just set it on the floor. Minimalist life, remember? When I did my morning routine, I showed you guys this journal, the five-minute journal. This morning, I filled out the morning section and now that it's nighttime, I'll be filling in the night section. There are two parts in the night section. The first one says highlights of the day and the second one says, what did I learn today? And I'll also read today's quote, be present in all things and thankful for all things. My final highlight of the day would probably be talking with my family and friends. I miss my loved ones back home but I always try my hardest to keep in touch with them. The final question is what did I learn today?
